---
title: "IBISWorld"
page-layout: article
---

# IBISWorld

## Description

Industry research platform with reports on market size, trends, performance, risks, major companies, and forecasts. Supports industry analysis, business planning, and market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Data Platform

## Access notes

Due to licensing restrictions with IBISWorld, users are limited to fewer than 50 downloads per session. Exceeding this limit may result in a university-wide loss of access to this resource.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-ibisworld)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
